title: Reselect Columns Post-Processing
spi_interface: PostProcessor (AutoCloseable) — methods: configure(Map), apply(Object key, Struct value), close()
lifecycle_phases: INIT: configure(Map<String,?> properties) — parse include/exclude lists, reselectUnavailableValues, reselectNullValues, reselectUseEventKeyFields, errorHandlingMode
INIT: injectBeanRegistry(BeanRegistry) — resolve connectorConfig, valueConverterProvider, jdbcConnection, schema
RUNTIME: apply(Object messageKey, Struct value) — main processing loop per change event
apply_activity_flow: GUARD: value == null? → log debug, RETURN
GUARD: messageKey not instanceof Struct? → log debug, RETURN
GUARD: after == null? → log debug, RETURN
GUARD: operation == READ ('r')? → RETURN (skip snapshot reads)
GUARD: source == null? → log debug, RETURN
GUARD: table == null? → log debug, RETURN
TRUE: iterate key.schema().fields() → collect keyColumns + resolveKeyFieldValue(key, field)
FALSE: iterate table.primaryKeyColumns() → collect keyColumns + resolveKeyFieldValue(after, field)
CALL: jdbcConnection.reselectColumns(table, requiredColumns, keyColumns, keyValues, source, callback)
CALLBACK: for each columnName in requiredColumns: getConvertedValue(tableId, column, field, rs.getObject(columnName)) → after.put(field.name(), convertedValue)
END: event after-struct mutated in-place with re-selected values
get_required_column_selections_flow: For each field, get current value = after.get(field)
is_unavailable_value_holder_logic: If field schema type == ARRAY: iterate collection elements with isUnavailableValueHolder(valueSchema, element); also check isUnavailableArrayValueHolder for INT32/INT64 arrays
BYTES: compare via ByteBuffers.equals or ByteBuffer.equals
STRING: match unavailableValuePlaceholder OR JSON form for HSTORE/JSON/JSONB fields
selector_predicate_logic: build(): include takes priority over exclude; if neither set → always true (x → true)
key_dependencies: BeanRegistry: lookupByName for CONNECTOR_CONFIG, VALUE_CONVERTER, JDBC_CONNECTION, DATABASE_SCHEMA
config_properties: reselect.columns.include.list — regex of fully-qualified column names to include
reselect.columns.exclude.list — regex of fully-qualified column names to exclude
reselect.use.event.key (default: false) — use Kafka event key fields vs table PK columns
reselect.error.handling.mode (default: warn) — warn | fail on SQL error or row-not-found
error_handling: Row not found after reselect: WARN logs or throws DebeziumException(FAIL mode)
SQLException during reselect: WARN logs or throws DebeziumException(FAIL mode)
Both null + unavailable disabled: WARN logged at configure time

test_class_summary.test_table: dbz4321 (id int PK, data varchar(50), data2 int)

important_notes: apply() mutates the Struct 'after' in-place. READ operations ('r') are always skipped. Signal tables are always skipped. Column selector uses fully-qualified names: 'schema.table:column'. Unavailable value placeholder is connector-configurable bytes; checked as String, ByteBuffer, Map, JSON, and INT32/INT64 arrays.
